CAVE2025.title: Project NEXUS @ CAVE 2025
CAVE2025.description: Returning for CaVe 2025, Project NEXUS showcased youth-driven innovation with three sub-projects addressing environmental challenges through smart tech and community engagement, continuing its mission to empower youth and promote sustainable development.

body1.title: Smart Environmental Tracking and Intelligent Notification for Efficient Litter (SENTINEL)
body1.desc: A smart waste monitoring system using IoT sensors and GPS to track bin levels, send real-time alerts, and ensure timely collection, reducing litter and promoting cleaner, smarter waste management.
bullet_desc: Transitioned from Arduino Uno R3 to ESP32 for Wi-Fi-enabled communication
Integrated a Bluetooth module and ESP32 camera for real-time wireless data transmission and monitoring.
Simplified interfacing and improved overall user experience through fully wireless operation.

body2.title: ReEarth
body2.desc: A mobile platform that lets users buy, sell, or give away recyclables, with an intuitive marketplace and AI-powered tips to make sustainable practices simple and engaging.
bullet_desc: An intelligent chatbot that gives real-time recommendations, helps repurpose materials, and supports proper waste handling.
Encourages informed, eco-conscious choices while fostering active participation in sustainable practices.
Promotes waste reduction and environmental responsibility, empowering individuals to contribute to global green goals.

body3.title: MOTOGP 25
body3.desc: An interactive racing simulation using motion tracking to translate rider movements into real-time gameplay, delivering speed, precision, and an immersive racing experience.
bullet_desc: Transforms natural body movements into real-time racing actions.
Delivers speed, precision, and realism without traditional controllers.
Engages users through hands-on racing that blends technology with adrenaline.

CAVE2024.title: Project HARMONY @ CAVE 2024
CAVE2024.description: Project HARMONY was a collaborative showcase by our club during CAVE 2024, aimed at promoting innovation, inclusivity, and sustainable development through technology and creativity. The initiative featured six unique sub-projects, each designed to address real-world challenges while empowering youth through education, awareness, and digital solutions.

body1.title: CLEANFLO Project
body1.desc: The Cleanflo Project, part of Project HARMONY @ CAVE 2024, is a tech-driven initiative aimed at transforming how we manage indoor air quality and energy consumption in households. It directly addresses SDG 7 – Affordable and Clean Energy, by promoting smarter, more efficient air conditioning systems that reduce costs and improve health outcomes
body1.desc2: CLEANFLO uses Light Dependent Resistors (LDRs) to detect the cleanliness of AC filters:
bullet_desc: LDR sensors measure light passing through AC filters, triggering red/green LED alerts for dirty or clean filters.
A second LDR tracks energy consumption, giving users detailed usage analytics.
Sends filter cleaning alerts, displays daily energy reports, and provides maintenance contact info.

body2.title: EPISTEMEMO Project
body2.desc: Epistememo is a next-generation note-taking application developed under Project HARMONY @ CAVE 2024, designed to support Sustainable Development Goal 4: Quality Education. This project addresses the challenges students face in managing digital notes and capturing key information during lectures, offering a personalized and intelligent learning experience.
body2.desc2: Epistememo tackles common student challenges with a suite of smart features:
bullet_desc: Automatically detects keywords, acronyms, and definitions to organize notes into a meaningful format.
Provides contextual insights (functions, pros/cons, origins) and instantly generates flashcards to reinforce learning.
Tracks study activity by tags and flashcard usage, giving learners clear insights into their focus and progress.

body3.title: THE HEEJAU ADVOCATES
body3.desc: The Heejau Advocates is a youth-led initiative under Project HARMONY @ CAVE 2024, dedicated to raising awareness and promoting education around climate change. This project supports Sustainable Development Goal 13: Climate Action, with a strong focus on Target 13.3, which emphasizes the importance of education in building the knowledge and capacity needed to effectively address climate challenges.
bullet_desc: Educate the youth by using HTML,CSS and JavaScript to develop an educational  website.
Consist of short courses module about climate change awareness, which embodies several user-friendly features.

body4.title: WildAR – Augmented Reality for Wildlife Awareness
body4.desc: W1ldAR is an innovative project under Project HARMONY @ CAVE 2024, designed to support Sustainable Development Goal 15: Life on Land, specifically Target 15.5, which calls for urgent action to reduce habitat degradation, halt biodiversity loss, and protect endangered species.
body4.desc2: The W1ldAR app combines technology and education to create a unique conservation tool:
bullet_desc: Insert lifelike 3D models of local animals into photos for engaging, interactive learning.
Access animal profiles with facts, habitats, and conservation status, enhanced with quizzes and challenges.
Share creations, join campaigns, and collaborate to promote wildlife conservation efforts.

NexTech2024.title: NexTech Conference And Expo 2024
NexTech2024.description: SYNTECH participated in NexTech 2024, a two-day tech event that brought together future innovators, students, and industry leaders. Our members showcased projects, attended keynotes, and represented the club in an event celebrating the next generation of technology.

ImagineHack2024.title: ImagineHack 2024
ImagineHack2024.description: Pigeon is an AI-powered idea validation system developed by our SYNTECH team, Can’tImagine, during ImagineHack 2024. The project addresses a common problem faced by early-stage startups: validating and refining business ideas before presenting them to venture capitalists or investors.Built using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Pigeon enhances idea evaluation by retrieving relevant context using vector embeddings and feeding it into a large language model, resulting in more accurate, insightful, and localized feedback for startup founders.
features: Idea Kitchen – Ask, analyze, and refine startup ideas
Elevator Pitch – Generate AI-powered pitch decks
Wide Knowledge Base – Pulls data from external sources for better context
Competitor Analysis – Evaluate idea feasibility and market competition

MakerFair2025.title: PETROBOTS Hackathon 2025
MakerFair2025.description: PyroSense AI is a compact, AI-powered system designed to tackle urban waste issues by enhancing real-time waste monitoring and optimizing collection efficiency. The project introduces SENTINEL, a small device that tracks bin status and location, sending live updates to a central system to reduce waste overflow and environmental hazards.
